name: model-prompt-lab
description: Verified model routing, production prompt architecture, migration audits, and benchmark design on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Route, build, migrate, and test model prompts on Claude Code, Cowork, and Codex.
interface.longDescription: Model Prompt Lab selects a verified model and prompt operation before loading focused production guidance on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, or Codex, then supports migration audits and benchmark design without inventing unstable platform behavior.
defaultPrompt: Route this prompt job to the right verified model workflow.
Audit this prompt before migrating it to another model.
Design a representative benchmark for this production prompt.
